context_for_next_testing_agent:
Admin Bill Payment Approval Flow - Iteration 84:

## Features Verified:
1. GET /api/admin/bill-payment/requests - Returns list with all statuses including approved_manual
2. POST /api/admin/bill-payment/process (approve action) - When Eko API fails (403 IP not whitelisted), status becomes approved_manual
3. POST /api/admin/bill-payment/complete - Manual completion endpoint works for approved_manual status
4. UI shows 'Manual Required' amber badge for approved_manual requests
5. UI shows 'IP not whitelisted' error text
6. View and Complete buttons are displayed for approved_manual requests
7. Complete button successfully marks request as completed

## Test Files Created:
- /app/tests/e2e/admin-bill-payment-approval.spec.ts (15 tests)
- /app/backend/tests/test_admin_bill_payment_approval.py (13 tests)

## Data Status:
- approved_manual requests: ~8-10 remain in database
- pending requests: 0-1 remain (consumed by approval tests)

## Admin Navigation Path:
/admin → Login with UID 8175c02a-4fbd-409c-8d47-d864e979f59f and PIN 123456 → Request Approvals → Bill Payments → Approved tab → Page 2 contains Manual Required requests
